# In Parallel

> The AI notetaker that writes your plan. In Parallel joins your meetings, captures every decision and commitment, and turns them into a living execution plan -- automatically. Start free.

## Product
- [Homepage](https://www.in-parallel.com/): Product overview -- free AI notetaker and living execution plan
- [How It Works](https://www.in-parallel.com/how-it-works): Meeting workflow -- before, during, after, and continuous
- [Living Plan](https://www.in-parallel.com/living-plan): Auto-updating plan with drift detection and tool integrations
- [Better with AI](https://www.in-parallel.com/better-with-ai): How In Parallel complements Copilot, Claude, and other AI tools -- the coordination layer for AI-powered teams
- [Execution Intelligence](https://www.in-parallel.com/execution-intelligence): MCP Context Platform, stakeholder comms, meeting intelligence (coming soon)
- [Pricing](https://www.in-parallel.com/pricing): Free AI Note-Taker, Living Plan (from EUR69/scope/month), and Enterprise
- [Vision](https://www.in-parallel.com/vision): From coordination tax to coordination layer

## Use Cases
- [Use Cases Overview](https://www.in-parallel.com/use-case): By role and function
- [COO / Operations](https://www.in-parallel.com/use-case/coo)
- [Program Manager](https://www.in-parallel.com/use-case/program-manager)
- [Project Manager](https://www.in-parallel.com/use-case/project-manager)
- [Engineering Leader](https://www.in-parallel.com/use-case/engineering-leader)
- [Team Lead](https://www.in-parallel.com/use-case/team-lead)
- [Account Executive](https://www.in-parallel.com/use-case/account-executive)
- [Strategy / PMO](https://www.in-parallel.com/use-case/strategy)

## Security & Compliance
- [Security](https://www.in-parallel.com/security): ISO 27001, ISO 42001, SOC 2 Type II, GDPR compliance, EU data residency
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.in-parallel.com/privacy-policy): Data handling and privacy practices
- [Terms of Use](https://www.in-parallel.com/terms-of-use): Terms of service
- [Cookie Policy](https://www.in-parallel.com/cookie-policy): Cookie usage policy
